_comment: Edit this file to update meetings and events. Date format: YYYY-MM-DD. Time format: 24-hour HH:MM. Type can be: meeting, workshop, competition, social, guest, other.

events.title: General Meeting #5
events.description: Recap of the semester and elections for next year's officers.

events.title: Hour of Code Workshop
events.description: Beginner-friendly intro to Python. Bring a friend who's never coded before.

events.title: End-of-Year Hackathon
events.description: 8-hour build-anything hackathon with prizes. Teams of 2-4. Snacks provided.

events.title: Guest Speaker: AI Engineer
events.description: An ML engineer from a local startup will talk about what it's actually like to work in AI.

events.title: Pizza & Project Showcase
events.description: Show off the projects you built this year. Free pizza for all attendees.

announcements.text: Applications for next year's officer positions close May 20.
Volunteer tutoring sign-ups now open for AP CS students.
Congrats to our team for placing 3rd in the regional CyberPatriot finals!
